vocab.meaning: sự khao khát/đam mê mãnh liệt không biết chán
vocab.example: As a youngster, I had an insatiable appetite for adventure stories, often finishing a book in a single sitting.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt nhận thức/trí tuệ
vocab.example: Solving complex jigsaw puzzles provided the perfect cognitive stimulation for me during rainy afternoons.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: I loved pottery because the tactile engagement with wet clay was incredibly soothing and satisfying.

vocab.meaning: sự sáng tạo không bị giới hạn/gò bó
vocab.example: My childhood hobbies allowed for unfettered creativity, where I could build entire worlds out of cardboard boxes.

vocab.meaning: người học qua vận động (thích các hoạt động chân tay)
vocab.example: Being a kinesthetic learner, I was naturally drawn to sports like gymnastics rather than stationary games.

vocab.meaning: sự chú ý tỉ mỉ đến từng chi tiết nhỏ
vocab.example: Collecting insects required a meticulous attention to detail to ensure each specimen was preserved correctly.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu sâu sắc
vocab.example: Finishing a complex model airplane gave me a profound sense of accomplishment that boosted my confidence.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác với bạn bè đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: Playing football after school wasn't just about the sport; it was crucial for my peer interaction and social skills.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/phát triển một tài năng
vocab.example: My parents bought me a small violin to nurture a talent they noticed when I was only five years old.

vocab.meaning: trốn thoát khỏi sự nhàm chán
vocab.example: Sketching in the margins of my notebooks was my favorite way to flee from boredom during long car rides.
